transcription.text: introducing my new panitos featuring the deli trio and turkey bacon and cheddar both on toasted ciabatta bread served in a no-mask bag they're almost too easy to eat on the go so here are a few panitos and panidons eating in a car eating on a car while tackling errands while getting tackled by a guy named aaron while working on your website while twerking at a construction site actually i think that's a panido try my new deli trio or turkey bacon and cheddar panitos liver
